context: Tests whether the agent implements SOX approval controls with correct thresholds, throws exceptions on violations, uses the prescribed FinancialControlEvent structure with all required fields, designs the audit log as append-only, and uses the correct control reference IDs.

checklist.name: FinancialControlEvent interface
checklist.description: Defines a FinancialControlEvent (or equivalent) type/interface that includes: id, timestamp (ISO 8601), controlRef, controlName, event, actor, actorRole, subject, outcome, data fields

checklist.name: Outcome field values
checklist.description: The outcome field is typed/constrained to exactly 'pass', 'fail', or 'exception' — no other values

checklist.name: Append-only log design
checklist.description: The FinancialAuditLog class or implementation notes explicitly state/enforce that entries are written append-only — no update or delete operations are exposed or used

checklist.name: High-value order threshold
checklist.description: The high-value order approval control uses $10,000 (1,000,000 cents) as the threshold — NOT a different value

checklist.name: High-value order control ref
checklist.description: The high-value order audit log entry uses controlRef 'SOX-OTC-001'

checklist.name: High-value order throws on failure
checklist.description: The high-value order control throws a typed error (not just returns false or logs) when the approver lacks the required role

checklist.name: Payment run threshold
checklist.description: The large payment run dual-approval control uses $50,000 (5,000,000 cents) as the threshold — NOT a different value

checklist.name: Payment run dual approvers
checklist.description: The payment run control requires at least 2 distinct approvers (unique user IDs), not just 2 approval records from the same person

checklist.name: Payment run control ref
checklist.description: The payment run audit log entry uses controlRef 'SOX-P2P-002'

checklist.name: Payment run throws on failure
checklist.description: The payment run control throws a typed error when the dual-approver requirement is not met

checklist.name: Audit log on every invocation
checklist.description: Both control functions write to the audit log on EVERY invocation — including when the control passes — not only on failure

checklist.name: Controls design doc
checklist.description: controls-design.md exists and documents at least the two controls with their thresholds and what triggers a failure
